title: MoCA: Mixture-of-Components Attention for Scalable Compositional 3D Generation

problemStatement.description: Existing 3D generative models have limitations in scalability and efficiency for compositional generation.
limitations: Scalability of global attention: Naive global attention over all component tokens has O(N²L²) complexity, which is prohibitive for a large number of components (N).
Uniform attention wastes capacity: Not all components interact strongly, but existing models allocate resources to low-value interactions.

proposedSolution.coreIdea: A native compositional 3D generative model designed for efficient, scalable, and accurate compositional modeling of 3D objects and scenes.

keyInnovations.name: Importance-based component routing
keyInnovations.description: A lightweight router module estimates the importance of other components for a given component and selects the top-k important components for sparse global attention.

keyInnovations.name: Compression of distant components
keyInnovations.description: Components not selected by the router are compressed into compact tokens for global attention, preserving coarse-grained context while reducing the number of tokens in attention computations.

computationalComplexity.newMethodDescription: Reduces complexity by using sparse attention and token compression.
